name: Day 30 — first campaign brief
prompt: One-time on day 30 (~6 June). Read 30 days of email rev share, conversion baseline, top creatives from Creative library. Brief Meta cold + remarketing campaigns at £5/day total starting cap. Save spec to outputs/campaigns/day30-launch.md. iMessage Caner for approval before campaign-launch fires.

name: Daily budget pacing
prompt: Run budget-pacing skill. Pull spend across all paid channels. Compare to budgets.json caps. Pause overspend, surface underspend. Append outputs/spend-snapshots/.

name: Daily campaign launch queue
prompt: Check the queue in Creative library tagged for paid. Use campaign-launch skill to draft campaigns paused. iMessage Caner for unpause approval.

name: Wednesday creative test
prompt: Use creative-test skill to spec a 3-variant creative test for the highest-spending campaign. Save plan to outputs/test-plans/.

name: Sunday ROAS + CAC report
prompt: Pull 7-day ROAS + blended CAC across Meta/TikTok/Google. Compare to kpi-targets.json. Recommend scale up / hold / scale down per channel. iMessage Caner.
